assets.name: ECDH-P256
assets.location: Pacemaker implant firmware, telemetry session key establishment
assets.notes: Firmware is field-updatable only via clinic visit; devices are implanted for 8-12 years.

assets.name: ECDSA-P256
assets.location: Pacemaker implant firmware, firmware update signature verification

assets.name: AES-128-GCM
assets.location: Pacemaker implant firmware, telemetry payload encryption
assets.notes: Encrypts cardiac event logs transmitted to the clinic gateway.

assets.name: RSA-2048
assets.location: Clinic gateway server, TLS certificate for remote monitoring portal
assets.notes: Standard server, easier migration path than the implant firmware.
